scope: Port upstream permission path validation into AgenC filesystem tool permission checks

requiredBehaviors: strip surrounding path quotes before validation
expand only safe tilde forms and reject unresolved tilde variants
reject shell expansion syntax before filesystem resolution
reject UNC network paths before filesystem resolution
extract glob base directories for read validation and reject glob writes
edgeCases: a path starting with $HOME is rejected without resolving against cwd
a write path containing a glob is rejected with an exact-file-path reason
a read glob validates the base directory rather than the literal glob path
~root remains unresolved and requires manual approval

requiredBehaviors: allow reads inside the active working directory without explicit rules
require acceptEdits mode before auto-allowing writes inside the active working directory
apply content-specific deny rules before working-directory allows
apply content-specific allow rules to write targets outside the working directory
emit ask decisions and suggestions when no allow path applies
edgeCases: FileRead deny rules beat an otherwise allowed cwd read
Write allow rules with /** match descendants outside cwd
default-mode writes inside cwd ask instead of auto-allowing
acceptEdits writes inside cwd return a mode allow decision

requiredBehaviors: FileRead routes file_path through path validation before execution
configured allowed paths are included as extra working directories for FileRead
missing file_path returns an ask decision instead of throwing
edgeCases: missing FileRead file_path returns an ask decision instead of throwing
FileRead uses the configured allowed path as cwd when input cwd is absent

requiredBehaviors: Write routes file_path through path validation before execution
tool permission checks preserve the tool input as updatedInput on allow
tool permission checks surface blockedPath on ask decisions
configured allowed paths are included as extra working directories for Write
edgeCases: Write outside cwd asks and returns the resolved denied target
missing Write file_path returns an ask decision instead of throwing
Write passes the original input through updatedInput when validation allows

requiredBehaviors: Edit routes file_path through path validation before execution
Edit treats missing or empty old_string as create validation
configured allowed paths are included as extra working directories for Edit
edgeCases: Edit treats an empty old_string as create validation
missing Edit file_path returns an ask decision instead of throwing
Edit validates write operations before execution when old_string is present

requiredBehaviors: classify wildcard removals as dangerous
classify filesystem roots as dangerous
classify home directory removal as dangerous
classify direct root children and Windows drive roots as dangerous
leave deeper ordinary workspace descendants non-dangerous
edgeCases: root slash is dangerous
a direct POSIX root child is dangerous
C:/ and C:/Windows are dangerous
a child below a temporary workspace root is not dangerous

approvedExceptions.reason: Allows TypeScript top-type annotations; not an unspecified implementation placeholder.
Allows the existing PermissionResult API field name for ask decisions; it is not deferred-work language.
Allows the existing FileRead range-view term; not a partial implementation marker.
Allows the Tool API schema field for synchronous tools; not a deferred implementation marker.
Allows pre-existing FileEdit comments outside this path-validation port; behavior rows remain required.
